records.title: Sleep Through the Night: Sound Machine for Light Sleepers
records.description: 30 soothing sounds — brown noise, white noise, nature tracks — to mask the sounds that wake you up. Volume dial, sleep timer, soft night light. Under £21 on Amazon UK.

records.title: Block Out Noise for Better Sleep — 30 Sounds, 36 Volume Levels
records.description: A plug-in sound machine designed to keep light sleepers asleep. Brown and white noise, nature sounds, customisable volume, 5 sleep timers — all for under £21.

records.title: Stop Waking Up at Every Sound — Noise Machine for Light Sleepers
records.description: Brown and white noise to cover footsteps, traffic, snoring — whatever's keeping you up. 30 sound options, adjustable volume, soft night light. £20 on Amazon UK.

records.title: Wind Down and Sleep: Soothing Sound Machine for Anxious Sleepers
records.description: 30 calming sounds including brown noise, rain, and white noise to help quiet a busy mind. Sleep timers, adjustable volume, soft colour night light. Under £21.

records.title: Calm a Busy Mind at Bedtime — 30 Sounds for Anxious Sleepers
records.description: Brown noise and soothing soundscapes to ease the mental chatter keeping you awake. 5 sleep timers, 36 volume levels, 12-colour night light. Under £21 on Amazon UK.

records.title: Fall Asleep Faster with Brown Noise — Soothing Sleep Sounds
records.description: A bedtime sound machine with 30 calming options designed to quieten anxious thoughts. Brown noise, white noise, nature sounds, adjustable volume. Amazon UK, under £21.

records.title: Sleep Without Interruption — Sound Machine with 30 Soothing Sounds
records.description: Consistent background sound to help restless sleepers settle and stay asleep. Brown noise, rain, fan sounds and more — 36 volume levels, 5 sleep timers. Under £21 on Amazon.

records.title: Stop Restless Nights — Brown Noise Machine for Deeper Sleep
records.description: Steady sound to settle a restless mind and body at bedtime. 30 sounds, adjustable volume, gentle night light — works as background noise from the moment you lie down. Under £21.

records.title: Get to Sleep and Stay There — Brown Noise Machine, 30 Sounds
records.description: A plug-in noise machine with 30 sleep sounds to ease you into a consistent sleep routine. Brown noise, white noise, fan sounds, adjustable volume. Under £21 on Amazon UK.
